# Lumian Services

Lumian Services is a Swiss cleaning service for private and small commercial customers. The company offers window cleaning, glass cleaning, blind and shutter cleaning, gutter cleaning, terrace cleaning, balcony cleaning, facade-adjacent exterior cleaning, solar panel / PV cleaning on request, roof cleaning on request, move-out cleaning support and general exterior cleaning.

Primary language: German / Swiss German. English is also supported.

Service area: Switzerland, especially Aargau, Zürich, Zug, Luzern, Lenzburg, Aarau, Baden, Brugg, Wohlen, Othmarsingen and surrounding regions.

Best contact: WhatsApp or phone +41 77 279 47 07, email info@lumianservices.ch.

Important pages:
- https://www.lumianservices.ch/
- https://www.lumianservices.ch/#services
- https://www.lumianservices.ch/#gallery
- https://www.lumianservices.ch/#booking
- https://www.lumianservices.ch/#faq

Relevant search terms: Fensterreinigung, Glasreinigung, Fenster putzen, Fensterputzer, Storenreinigung, Rollladenreinigung, Dachrinnenreinigung, Dachreinigung, Solaranlagen Reinigung, Solarpanel Reinigung, PV Reinigung, Fassadenreinigung, Hochdruckreinigung, Terrassenreinigung, Balkonreinigung, Wintergarten Reinigung, Gebäudereinigung, Hausreinigung, Wohnungsreinigung, Umzugsreinigung, Endreinigung, Putzfirma, Reinigungsfirma, Reinigung Aargau, Reinigung Zürich, Reinigung Zug, Reinigung Luzern, cleaning services Switzerland, window cleaning, roof cleaning, house cleaning, building cleaning.
